parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "CustomerID": 0,
  "ParentCustomerID": {{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.ParentCustomerID ?? 3 }},
  "CustomerName": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.CustomerName }}",
  "TaxExemptionCode": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.TaxCode }}",
  "CustomerCategoryCode": "End User",
  "Description": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.Description ?? '' }}",
  "IndustryCode": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.Industry ?? '' }}",
  "TaxCombinationCode": "EXENTO",
  "CurrencyCode": "USD",
  "CreditTermsCode": "Net 30",
  "InvoiceDeliveryMode": "E-Mail",
  "EmailGeneral": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.EmailGeneral }}",
  "EmailBilling": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.EmailGeneral }}",
  "MainContactPhone": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.MainContactPhone ?? '' }}",
  "AccountManagerCode": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.AccountManagerCode ?? '' }}",
  "ShowCdrsOnInvoice": {{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.ShowCdrsOnInvoice ?? false }},
  "ShowZeroChargesOnInvoice": false,
  "ShowPreviousBalanceOnInvoice": false,
  "DeviceIdentifierOnInvoice": "ICCID",
  "RollupInvoiceToParentCustomer": false,
  "MainAddressSameAsParentMainAddress": false,
  "BillingAddressSameAsMainAddress": true,
  "MainAddress": {
    "AddressID": 0,
    "AddressLine1": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.Location ?? '' }}",
    "City": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.City ?? '' }}",
    "PostCode": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.PostalCode ?? '' }}",
    "State": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.State ?? '' }}",
    "CountryCode": "{{ ({3:'ARG',4:'CHL',5:'PRY',6:'PER'})[$('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.ParentCustomerID] }}",
    "AddressFormatCode": "Postcode City"
  },
  "BillingAddress": {
    "AddressID": 0,
    "AddressLine1": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.Location ?? '' }}",
    "City": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.City ?? '' }}",
    "PostCode": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.PostalCode ?? '' }}",
    "State": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.State ?? '' }}",
    "CountryCode": "{{ ({3:'ARG',4:'CHL',5:'PRY',6:'PER'})[$('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.ParentCustomerID] }}",
    "AddressFormatCode": "Postcode City"
  },
  "ContactPersons": [
    {
      "ContactPersonID": 0,
      "ContactName": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.CustomerName }}",
      "Email": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.EmailGeneral }}",
      "Phone1": "{{ $('Webhook Clientes').item.json.body.MainContactPhone ?? '' }}",
      "IsMainContact": true
    }
  ]
}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, message: 'Cliente sincronizado correctamente', CustomerID: $input.item.json.CustomerID, ibis: $input.item.json }) }}
